description:
Safety net for the bl-02c3 sweep request — bl-02c3 is in-flight and a note may not be heeded, so this guarantees the right outcome.

After bl-02c3 lands, verify the tracker / fresh-clone materialization code matches the post-split model (bl-2e26 §12/§13):
- NO trail-walk / transitive next:-chain remains (bl-9329 removes the walk).
- The tracker syncs tasks_branch <-> its remote (ff-only/union); remote resolution = pointer > autodiscovered origin (bl-cd21).
- Fresh-clone materialization adopts the store the LANDING names (seeded default or installed), not a discovered terminus.
If residual trail code landed, remove it here. Close as a no-op if bl-02c3 already swept clean.
title: Verify bl-02c3 landed aligned to the store-remote model (no residual trail-walk)
